calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-18-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Petitioner Lisa Wolf, mother, appeared in pro per and Commander Russell Gottfried, father, also present. Both parties were sworn and examined. The Court grants the name change over the objections of the father. Minor's name changed to Emily Rose Wolf. Decree signed in open court.
